title: Dungeons Stone
description: Makes stone look like the one found in Minecraft Dungeons. It was also an unused texture from the 1.14 texture update.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Dungeons Stone** gives stone the appearance of the stone found in Minecraft Dungeons. This texture is also an unused one from the texture update. Ores included!
